name: Cherry Chiffon Dessert
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces pineapple chunks in juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cherry pie filling, sweetened condensed milk, whipped topping, pineapple, and marshmallows.
2. Mix until all ingredients are well blended.
3. Chill until ready to serve.
